reviews.review_title: Real fun game loved the players
reviews.review_description: This game is dead now but was really fun back then still hope more players get it and enjoy it
Idk if yall already added 1 handed movement or not but if you haven't please do also great game been here since day 1
Love the game but no one plays it :(
i recomend this for anyone who like good gorilla game so best

reviews.review_title: Great game but remove the horror
reviews.review_description: So I like playing gorrila tag fanmade games but the ones that are friendly and doesn’t have horror so I checked this game and I thought it didn’t have horror but it does?, please remove it
This game seems pretty cool and I like it

reviews.review_title: This is a Fantastic Game I Recommend 100
reviews.review_description: Fantastic Game recommend 2000% It is Fire

This is a great game! Imo the best fan game out there! There is a whole bunch of maps. 
Canyons, Forest, Zero Gravity, City, Only Up, THE SOLAR SYSTEM! What? Anyways great game you should totally play it.
This is one of the best gtag fan games right now, I really recommend getting it!!!

I have played this game and it was AWESOME 
And i made ALOT of friends in this game
this game is so good all moderators are nice and cool (no glaze)
I played it it really fun if you like gorilla tag ill recommend it

reviews.review_title: Moderators are kicking ppl for fun
reviews.review_description: The Game IS good and i Like the cosmetics very much ! But the mods are abusing their powers by equipping some Hammer 🔨 and hitting ppl . After they got Hit they get kicked from the Game ! That happened to me aswell since there is only 2 Lobbys that the mods could be in i ran into one and they kicked me 8 Times in a row after rejoining ! I then Had enouth and told them they we're Not a good Mod and that they shouldnt deserve being one . They got Mad and reportedme and told the whole Lobby to Report me aswell :( thats when i decided to Go on Gorilla tag again ... I think the mods Name was zud or zed or smt...

developer_response.body: Sorry that we have moderators who cannot behave. We are doing a staff reset soon, sorry for the inconvenience!

reviews.review_description: It’s really a fun game with amazing staff and a great owner! If you want a vr game to socialize and have fun with other people then this game is definitely for you!

As a M.I.T of the game I find this game as one of the best games I've moderated. The staff are kind, the moderators are very active meaning that the community is pretty good, and the game is just built very well overall.
i dont even know how meta approved this game in the TOS the game must run 60+ FPS and im running 40 on quest 3 thats crazy this game is so buns bro
This game is so good, and has a lot of potential!
A bad game the owners admins and mods are just thinking it’s just a joke for them don’t recommend the game!

developer_response.body: We take our moderation seriously, if you have a complaint, join the discord server and send a complaint to us.

reviews.review_description: The mods take this game very seriously the game has lots if cosmetics and very fun game
Love the mods their really nice + updates are often which I like
